subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is the creation and the command, and all before Him bow down in adoration. God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, He Who quickeneth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر و کل له ساجدون شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو یحی
